meta.name: Server-Side Template Injection
meta.description: SSTI detection and exploitation payloads for Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, Velocity, Smarty, ERB, Pebble, and Mako. Includes probes, engine fingerprinting, and RCE chains. For authorized testing only.

payloads.description: Generic multiply probe — 49 confirms Jinja2/Twig/Pebble; echoed back means no SSTI
Dollar-brace probe — 49 confirms Freemarker/Velocity/Mako/Groovy
Hash-brace probe — used in some Expression Language (EL) contexts
ERB/EJS probe — 49 confirms Ruby ERB or JavaScript EJS rendering
Engine fingerprint — Jinja2 returns 49; Twig returns 7777777
Jinja2 — dumps Flask/Django config object including SECRET_KEY
Jinja2 — leaks internal template object reference
Jinja2 MRO dump — reveals class hierarchy for gadget chain construction
Jinja2 subclasses list — enumerate all loaded Python classes for gadget selection
Jinja2 RCE via globals() os.popen — executes OS command through Flask config class
Jinja2 RCE via Flask request object builtins chain
Jinja2 subprocess RCE — replace SUBPROCESS_INDEX with index of subprocess.Popen class

payloads.code: {% for x in ().__class__.__base__.__subclasses__() %}{% if 'warning' in x.__name__ %}{{x()._module.__builtins__['__import__']('os').popen('id').read()}}{% endif %}{% endfor %}
payloads.description: Jinja2 RCE via warnings module builtins — works when direct os access is sandboxed
Twig RCE via registerUndefinedFilterCallback — classic Twig 1.x exploit
Twig RCE via map+system filter (PHP 7 Twig)
Twig info leak — reads server environment variable via app.request
Twig Symfony context dump — reveals application object in debug mode
Freemarker RCE via Execute class instantiation — classic direct RCE
Freemarker RCE via #assign directive — same Execute gadget, alternate syntax
Freemarker LFI via Java URL chain — reads local file as byte array
Velocity RCE via java.lang.Runtime.exec() — classic Velocity exploitation chain
Velocity RCE via $class.inspect gadget — alternative runtime exec pattern
Smarty info leak — reveals Smarty template engine version
Smarty v3 {php} tag RCE — backtick execution (requires allow_php_tag=true)
Smarty RCE via Smarty_Internal_Write_File — writes webshell to disk
ERB math probe — 49 confirms Ruby ERB rendering
ERB RCE via Kernel#system — executes OS command in Ruby ERB template
ERB backtick RCE — backtick command substitution in Ruby
ERB LFI — reads local file via Ruby File.open
Mako/Python RCE via os.popen — works if os is available in Mako template namespace
Mako module-level import RCE — uses <% %> block to import os and exec command
Pebble/general probe — 49 confirms Pebble Java template engine
Pebble RCE via java.lang.Runtime import and exec
Polyglot SSTI probe — tests multiple engine syntaxes in one payload
Jinja2/Python class probe — confirms Python object access via template
Jinja2 WAF bypass — hex-encoded attribute names to evade underscore filters
Jinja2 RCE via namespace object globals — works in some Flask versions
